name: Nova UI Extension
description: Adds UI components to Nova: text boxes, images, panels, and draggable panels.
author: Buddyowl2

nova:import_image.description: Imports an image into the viewport.

nova:create_textbox.description: Creates a textbox in the viewport.

nova:create_panel.description: Creates a panel container in the viewport.

nova:create_draggable_panel.description: Creates a draggable panel in the viewport.

notes: This extension is optional. Core Nova commands remain fully functional without it.
